parse.title: Serrated Dirk
parse.wikitext:
{{Item info
|goldvalue = 
|goldefficiency =
|similaritems = Caulfield's Warhammer;Tiamat;The Brutalizer;Rectrix;Phage;Tunneler
|background = 
|notes =
|strategy = 
|trivia = 
* '''Serrated Dirk''' and {{ii|The Brutalizer}} are the only epic items that provide lethality.
* After its removal in [[V5.22]], {{iis|The Brutalizer}} stats were split across two items: its [[armor penetration]] went to {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} and its [[cooldown reduction]] to {{ii|Caulfield's Warhammer}}.
|media = 
|revisions = 
|patchhistory = 
;[[V26.01]]
* Now builds into {{ii|Bastionbreaker}}.

;[[V14.11]]
* Now limits the user to 1 {{sbc|Dirk}} item.

;[[V14.10]]
* {{sbc|Undocumented:}} Lethality increased to 10 from 0.
* {{sbc|Undocumented / Removed Unique Passive - Gouge:}} Gain 10 lethality.

;[[V14.6]]
* Attack damage reduced to 20 from 25.

;[[V14.1]]
* Total cost reduced to {{g|1000}} from {{g|1100}}.
** Combine cost reduced to {{g|300}} from {{g|400}}.
* Attack damage reduced to 25 from 30.
* No longer builds into {{ii|Axiom Arc}}, {{ii|Duskblade of Draktharr}}, {{ii|Eclipse}}, {{ii|Prowler's Claw}}.
* Now builds into {{ii|Hubris}} and {{ii|Opportunity}}.

;[[V11.23]]
* Now builds into {{ii|Axiom Arc}}.

;[[V11.13]]
* No longer builds into {{ii|Sanguine Blade}}.

;[[V10.23]]
* Updated icon.
* {{sbc|New:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{g|400}} = {{g|1100}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 30 attack damage.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Gouge:}} Grants 10 lethality.
** {{sbc|Builds Into:}} {{ii|Duskblade of Draktharr}}, {{ii|Eclipse}}, {{ii|Edge of Night}}, {{ii|Prowler's Claw}}, {{ii|Sanguine Blade}}, {{ii|Serpent's Fang}}, {{ii|The Collector}}, {{ii|Umbral Glaive}}, {{ii|Youmuu's Ghostblade}}.
* {{sbc|Old:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{g|400}} = {{g|1100}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 30 attack damage.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive:}} +10 lethality.
** {{sbc|Builds Into:}} {{ii|Duskblade of Draktharr}}, {{ii|Edge of Night}}, {{ii|Sanguine Blade}}, {{ii|Umbral Glaive}}, {{ii|Youmuu's Ghostblade}}.

;[[V9.24b]]
* Attack damage increased to 30 from 25.

;[[V9.23]]
* Now builds into {{ii|Sanguine Blade}} and {{ii|Umbral Glaive}}.
* {{sbc|Removed Unique Passive - Headhunter:}} After killing any enemy, your next damaging spell will deal {{as|40 '''bonus''' physical damage}} to all enemies it hits (30 second cooldown).

;[[V9.1]] - January 21, 2019
* No longer builds into {{ii|Spectral Cutlass}} and {{ii|Sword of the Divine}}, due to the [[Nexus Blitz]] being no longer available for play-testing.

;[[V8.17]]
* Added for the recipe for {{ii|Sword of the Divine}}.

;[[V8.16]] - Start of the experimental game mode [[Nexus Blitz]]
* Re-added back to the recipe for {{ii|Spectral Cutlass}}.

;[[V8.12]] - End of the ''Curse of the Drowned'' event (June 18th, 2018)
* Removed from recipe for {{ii|Spectral Cutlass}}, due to the item being removed from the game.

;[[V8.11]] - Start of the ''Curse of the Drowned'' event
* Added to recipe for {{ii|Spectral Cutlass}}.

;[[V7.24b]]
* Lethality reduced to 10 from 12.

;[[V7.22]]
* Lethality increased to 12 from 10.

;[[V7.14]]
* {{sbc|New Passive - Headhunter:}} After killing any enemy, your next damage spell will deal 40 '''bonus''' physical damage (30 second cooldown).
* {{sbc|Removed:}} +20 out-of-combat movement speed.
* {{sbc|New Effect:}} Tooltip now mentions how much armor the item's lethality is currently negating.

;[[V6.22]]
* Attack damage increased to 25 from 20.
* {{sbc|Removed Unique Passive:}} After killing a unit, your next basic attack or single target spell deals 15 bonus damage.
* {{sbc|Removed Unique Passive:}} +10 armor penetration.
* {{sbc|New Unique Passive:}} +10 Lethality.
* {{sbc|New Unique Passive:}} +20 out-of-combat movement speed.

;[[V6.3]]
* Added to recipe for {{ii|Duskblade of Draktharr}}.

;[[V5.22]] Added
* {{ii|Serrated Dirk}}:
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{g|400}} = {{g|1100}}
** +20 attack damage.
** {{sbc|Unique passive:}} +10 armor penetration.
** {{sbc|Unique passive:}} After killing a unit, your next basic attack or single target spell deals 15 bonus damage.
}}
